creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Sat, Jan 12, 2013 at 11:17:22AM +0100, Jeremie Le Hen wrote:
> Is there anything I can do to help you?  I am looking for some project
> in FreeBSD.

Right now I am the only one familiar with the codebase.  However, there
is an effort to completely reimplement it, called portbuild2: contact
bapt@ and decke@.

mcl
